allow: Bash(python3 -c "import openpyxl; import pandas; print\('Both available'\)" 2>&1 || pip install openpyxl pandas 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(which python3 && python3 --version && python3 -m pip install openpyxl pandas 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages openpyxl pandas 2>&1 | tail -10)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import os

base_dir = "/Users/arundurai/Public/Prasanna Works/medagg/backend/activite_csv"

files = {
    "NotesExport.xlsx": os.path.join\(base_dir, "NotesExport.xlsx"\),
    "callexport \(2\).xlsx": os.path.join\(base_dir, "callexport \(2\).xlsx"\),
    "systemNotesExport.xlsx": os.path.join\(base_dir, "systemNotesExport.xlsx"\),
    "whatsappExport.xlsx": os.path.join\(base_dir, "whatsappExport.xlsx"\),
}

for label, fpath in files.items\(\):
    print\("=" * 80\)
    print\(f"FILE: {label}"\)
    print\("=" * 80\)
    try:
        df = pd.read_excel\(fpath, dtype=str\)
        print\(f"\\nTotal Rows: {len\(df\)}"\)
        print\(f"Total Columns: {len\(df.columns\)}"\)
        print\(f"\\nColumn Headers \({len\(df.columns\)}\):"\)
        for i, col in enumerate\(df.columns, 1\):
            print\(f"  {i:2d}. {col}"\)
        print\(f"\\nSample Data \(first 5 rows\):"\)
        print\(df.head\(5\).to_string\(index=False\)\)
        print\(\)

        # Interesting patterns
        print\("Interesting Patterns:"\)
        for col in df.columns:
            unique_count = df[col].nunique\(\)
            null_count = df[col].isna\(\).sum\(\)
            if null_count > 0:
                print\(f"  - '{col}': {null_count} null values \({round\(null_count/len\(df\)*100, 1\)}% empty\)"\)
            if unique_count < 15 and unique_count > 0:
                vals = df[col].dropna\(\).unique\(\).tolist\(\)
                print\(f"  - '{col}': only {unique_count} unique values → {vals}"\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"  ERROR reading file: {e}"\)
    print\(\)

EOF)
